title: hibeam_g4 GEANT4 truth bridge feasibility and schema audit
repro_tolerance: exact provided macro should start beamOn and write output_krakow.root

raw_root_reproduction.reason: This ticket is an external GEANT4 truth-generation bridge, not a raw CCB HRD reproduction study.

notes: A local symlinked source sandbox supplied the missing hibeam_g4_build/README.md expected by the upstream CMakeLists.txt.

provided_macro.reason: The current ScatteringGenerator registers /ElGen/E, /ElGen/TargetThickness, and /ElGen/Beamspot, but not /ElGen/CSFile. The provided macro line /ElGen/CSFile sigma_pd_cm_190.txt therefore triggers COMMAND NOT FOUND.

patched_smoke_run.macro_change: removed unsupported /ElGen/CSFile line and reduced /run/beamOn to 100000

traditional.interpretation: Build succeeds, but the provided run macro is not compatible with this source revision.

ml.interpretation: No ML method was requested by the claimed GEANT4 infrastructure ticket.

winner.name: not_applicable_exact_macro_incompatible
winner.reason: The correct decision is not to declare a physics/ML winner: the production truth run is blocked by a macro/source interface mismatch. The patched smoke run validates the schema only.

deuteron_minus_proton_hit_edep_MeV.interpretation: Deuteron Sci_bar hits are more ionising per hit than proton hits.

deuteron_minus_proton_event_total_edep_M.interpretation: Proton-tagged events have larger total Sci_bar deposit in this geometry because they produce more Sci_bar hits and penetrate more often.

systematics: The exact provided macro cannot consume sigma_pd_cm_190.txt in this source revision.
The patched run samples scattering angle uniformly and is not a production p-d cross-section truth sample.
GEANT4 warns that Mylar material fractional masses sum to 1.378.
No Birks quenching, optical photon transport, or ADC response is validated against HRD data.

next_tickets.title: S17b: restore p-d cross-section sampling in hibeam_g4 ScatteringGenerator
next_tickets.body: Add or document a supported macro command for sigma_pd_cm_190.txt, rerun the 1M Krakow macro unmodified, and compare angular, range, and Sci_bar dE/dx distributions against S14/S15 action bands. Expected information gain: decides whether the GEANT4 bridge can become a production truth source instead of a schema-only smoke test.
